fields.returns: The number of coordinates written to <paramref name="coords" />.

params.coords: The span to fill with normalized variation coordinates.

fields.summary: Fills a span with the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.

params.coords: A read-only span of design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation using design-space coordinates.

params.coords: A read-only span of normalized coordinate values in the range [-1, 1] mapped to integers, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation using normalized coordinates.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation to a named instance.

params.variations: A read-only span of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.Variation" /> values to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font variation axes using the specified variation values.

fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinate values, one per variation axis.
fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.
